samples.xml_description:
Implement a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic. 16-bit input operand A. 16-bit input operand B. Carry-in input. 16-bit output representing the sum of A and B. Carry-out output.

Implement a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic.

Use half adders and full adders to perform addition.
